text.tspan: at ENTRY stop (rax contains syscall nr)
at EXIT stop (orig_rax is preserved nr)

td.code: rdi, rsi, rdx, r10, r8, r9

div.p: Invariant in_syscall == 0 Next stop = entry stop entry_time = unset
Invariant in_syscall == 1 current.syscall_nr = valid entry_time = set
trigger: waitpid → WIFSTOPPED (sig=0x85) guard: in_syscall == 0 actions:
trigger: waitpid → WIFSTOPPED (sig=0x85) guard: in_syscall == 1 actions:
